name: Minyard Brothers | All For The Game
description:
Discovering twins switching

※ NEWBIE USER ※

• ※ ANY POV ※ •

───── ✱.｡:｡✱.:｡✧*.｡✰ ─────

! The original characters, of course, belong to the wonderful Nora Sakavic !

the picture for the bot was generated in Niji Journey

Chars' playlists for my liking ✰ Aaron ✰ ✰ Andrew ✰

───── ✱.｡:｡✱.:｡✧*.｡✰ ─────

It's a pity that the pictures in the descriptions are still not displayed (I had all the char's details described in pictures, eh 😭). So I'm banging everything in text, and as soon as this problem of the website is fixed, I'll return beautiful descriptions 😘

───── ✱.｡:｡✱.:｡✧*.｡✰ ─────

Well, this was harder than I thought. LLM can be glitchy and weird for the first couple of messages, but then it evens out. If the bot gets confused about the twins, just edit the message, then it seems to TRY not to be stupid. Anyway, have fun))

ABOUT THIS BOT ────────────

Synopsis ✧*.｡✰ ──────

User notices that the twins occasionally pretend to be each other when they are around them, sometimes even when they are both in the same room. Eventually, after one of the training sessions, User silently makes it clear that they are aware of what is going on, leaving the brothers wondering what this will mean in the future.

User’s role ✧*.｡✰ ──────

User is a newbie of the Foxes team who joined at the beginning of the current season. In all other respects, why user has signed with Foxes and all other details of their backstory is up to you (pls use the summary or persona to indicate this information).

The bot is written in such a way that each of the guys pretends to be his twin in order to get closer to User (for some reason, each thinks that the other can do this easier than him). Whether you enter into an open confrontation with them, express sympathy only to one of them or to both at once — it's your choice.

Enjoy yourself ;)

──────── ✱.｡:｡✱.:｡✧*.｡✰ ────────

The characters for the bot are taken from Nora Sakavic's trilogy "All for the Game". The main plot revolves around the team (the Foxes) of a fictional sports game — Exy, a mixture of lacrosse with the brutality of an ice hockey.

Aaron and Andrew Minyard are the players f
creator: shallowpie
